Meta.title: Igee-elektronik | Electronics Portal
Meta.description: Electronics showcase with PCB services, embedded prototyping, maintenance, technical news, and direct contact.

Help.title: How can I help your electronics project?
Help.subtitle: I support companies and individuals with circuit design, embedded prototyping, and reliable electronics maintenance.
Help.card1Description: Schematic, multilayer routing, and DFM optimization for industrial manufacturing.
Help.card2Description: Microcontroller, sensor, and firmware integration to validate ideas quickly.
Help.card3Description: Diagnostics, repair, and upgrade of electronic boards used in production lines.

Causes.title: Core electronics services
Causes.subtitle: Clear technical offers to accelerate your R&D pipeline and connected products.
Causes.card1Title: High performance PCB design for IoT and automation
Causes.card2Title: Functional prototype with bench tests and firmware validation
Causes.card3Title: Retrofit of electronic systems and lifetime extension

News.subtitle: Follow updates in embedded electronics, instrumentation, and hardware innovation.

News.card1Description: Component selection, EMI filtering, and noise reduction for stable measurements.

Urgent.title: Medical prototype in critical phase, immediate support needed.
Urgent.description: A monitoring electronics module must be finalized quickly for clinical trials. Technical and material support is welcome.

Testimonials.title: What technical partners say
Testimonials.subtitle: Concrete feedback from clients who trusted Igee-elektronik with strategic electronics programs.
Testimonials.card1Quote: The control board redesign reduced our failure rate by 38 percent. Delivery was fast and highly professional.
Testimonials.card2Quote: The embedded prototype from IGEE validated our product in weeks. Excellent hardware and firmware expertise.

Volunteer.title: Start your electronics project

Footer.about: Igee-elektronik develops robust electronics solutions for IoT, energy systems, medical devices, and automation.
